requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——2016年英国电磁兼容法规（SI 2016/1091）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——2016年英國電磁相容法規（SI 2016/1091）

summary.en: The Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091) is the GB-retained successor to EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. Air-source heat pumps, as electrical apparatus containing motors and power electronics, are subject to EMC requirements covering both emissions (the appliance must not cause harmful electromagnetic interference to other equipment) and immunity (the appliance must operate as intended in the presence of expected electromagnetic disturbance). Manufacturers must demonstrate conformity with the Essential Requirements in Schedule 1 of SI 2016/1091. The harmonised standards route uses the relevant EN 55014 series (emissions and immunity for household appliances) and EN 61000 series (immunity). A UK Declaration of Conformity (UK DoC) citing SI 2016/1091 and the applicable harmonised standards must be prepared. EMC compliance is required before UKCA marking can be applied.
summary.zh: 《2016年电磁兼容法规》（SI 2016/1091）是英国留存的法规，为欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU的继承法规。空气源热泵作为含电机和功率电子器件的电气设备，须遵守涵盖发射（设备不得对其他设备造成有害电磁干扰）和抗扰度（设备在预期电磁干扰下须按预期运行）的电磁兼容要求。制造商须证明符合SI 2016/1091附表1中的基本要求。协调标准路径使用相关EN 55014系列（家用电器发射和抗扰度）和EN 61000系列（抗扰度）。须准备引用SI 2016/1091和适用协调标准的英国符合性声明（UK DoC）。加贴UKCA标志前须满足电磁兼容合规要求。
summary.zht: 《2016年電磁相容法規》（SI 2016/1091）是英國留存的法規，為歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU的繼承法規。空氣源熱泵作為含電機和功率電子器件的電氣設備，須遵守涵蓋發射（設備不得對其他設備造成有害電磁干擾）和抗擾度（設備在預期電磁干擾下須按預期運行）的電磁相容要求。製造商須證明符合SI 2016/1091附表1中的基本要求。協調標準路徑使用相關EN 55014系列（家用電器發射和抗擾度）和EN 61000系列（抗擾度）。須準備引用SI 2016/1091和適用協調標準的英國符合性聲明（UK DoC）。加貼UKCA標誌前須滿足電磁相容合規要求。

standards_or_laws: EN 55014-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission
EN 55014-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 2: Immunity
EN 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
EN 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances including heat pumps are primarily covered under GB 4343.1 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics for household appliances, electric tools, and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) and GB/T 4343.2 (immunity), which are technically based on the CISPR 14 series. For heat pumps and air conditioning equipment, GB/T 17626 series (IEC 61000-4 based) applies for immunity testing. EMC compliance is part of the CCC certification process. Chinese EMC test reports to GB 4343.1/4343.2 are not accepted as equivalent to EN 55014-1/55014-2 testing for UK EMC Regulations compliance, as the test conditions, limits, and certification pathways differ.
summary.zh: 中国针对包括热泵在内的家用电器的电磁兼容要求主要涵盖在GB 4343.1（家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的电磁干扰特性——第1部分：发射）和GB/T 4343.2（抗扰度）中，技术上基于CISPR 14系列。对于热泵和空调设备，GB/T 17626系列（基于IEC 61000-4）适用于抗扰度测试。电磁兼容合规是CCC认证流程的一部分。中国按GB 4343.1/4343.2出具的电磁兼容测试报告不被接受为等同于EN 55014-1/55014-2测试，以满足英国电磁兼容法规要求，因为测试条件、限值和认证路径存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國針對包括熱泵在內的家用電器的電磁相容要求主要涵蓋在GB 4343.1（家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的電磁干擾特性——第1部分：發射）和GB/T 4343.2（抗擾度）中，技術上基於CISPR 14系列。對於熱泵和空調設備，GB/T 17626系列（基於IEC 61000-4）適用於抗擾度測試。電磁相容合規是CCC認證流程的一部分。中國按GB 4343.1/4343.2出具的電磁相容測試報告不被接受為等同於EN 55014-1/55014-2測試，以滿足英國電磁相容法規要求，因為測試條件、限值和認證路徑存在差異。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — household appliances, electric tools — Emission (SAMR/SAC; based on CISPR 14-1)
GB/T 4343.2 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — household appliances, electric tools — Immunity (SAC; based on CISPR 14-2)
GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques (SAC; based on IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must obtain EN 55014-1, EN 55014-2, EN 61000-3-2, and EN 61000-3-3 test results from a UK-recognised laboratory or ILAC MRA-member laboratory. Existing Chinese EMC test reports to GB 4343 standards do not satisfy the UK EMC Regulations pathway. A UK DoC citing SI 2016/1091 and the applicable EN standards must be prepared alongside the product safety UK DoC (both are required for UKCA marking). EMC testing can often be combined with product safety testing at the same accredited facility, reducing duplication of effort.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须通过英国认可实验室或ILAC MRA成员实验室获取EN 55014-1、EN 55014-2、EN 61000-3-2和EN 61000-3-3测试结果。现有的按GB 4343标准出具的中国电磁兼容测试报告不满足英国电磁兼容法规路径。须准备引用SI 2016/1091和适用EN标准的英国符合性声明，与产品安全英国符合性声明一并准备（两者均是UKCA标志的必要条件）。电磁兼容测试通常可与产品安全测试在同一认可机构合并进行，减少重复工作。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須通過英國認可實驗室或ILAC MRA成員實驗室獲取EN 55014-1、EN 55014-2、EN 61000-3-2和EN 61000-3-3測試結果。現有的按GB 4343標準出具的中國電磁相容測試報告不滿足英國電磁相容法規路徑。須準備引用SI 2016/1091和適用EN標準的英國符合性聲明，與產品安全英國符合性聲明一並準備（兩者均是UKCA標誌的必要條件）。電磁相容測試通常可與產品安全測試在同一認可機構合併進行，減少重複工作。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance under SI 2016/1091 is mandatory for heat pumps placed on the GB market. Chinese GB 4343 EMC certification does not satisfy the UK pathway. EN 55014 series and EN 61000 series testing from a recognised laboratory, plus a UK DoC citing SI 2016/1091, are required before UKCA marking.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】依据SI 2016/1091，电磁兼容合规对投放大不列颠市场的热泵具有强制约束力。中国GB 4343电磁兼容认证不满足英国路径。在加贴UKCA标志之前，须通过认可实验室进行EN 55014系列和EN 61000系列测试，并准备引用SI 2016/1091的英国符合性声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】依據SI 2016/1091，電磁相容合規對投放大不列顛市場的熱泵具有強制約束力。中國GB 4343電磁相容認證不滿足英國路徑。在加貼UKCA標誌之前，須通過認可實驗室進行EN 55014系列和EN 61000系列測試，並準備引用SI 2016/1091的英國符合性聲明。

source.publisher: legislation.gov.uk / King's Printer of Acts of Parliament
